comment: The kit's drift contract. Two classes: engine-mirror files are byte-identical projections of supernovae-st/nika (pinned by sha256 at the engine SHA they were proven against — a pin mismatch is corruption, an upstream move is a re-sync alert, never the same signal); kit-native files are owned here and proven against the latest released binary instead.

entries.proof: mcp-tool-names + advertised commands exist in the latest released binary (scripts/check-mcp-tools.py + scripts/check-skill-commands.py)
